popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from Falaise Roll (Crispin) p 50

Picot (de Say), baron of Clun and Stoke-Say, Salop, who received twenty-nine manors, and was in 1083 one of the principal men summoned by Roger de Montgomery to …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire於大約1022年出生在法國諾門迪奧內時，他的父親Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel31歲，母親Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis22歲。他於大約1054年與Hugolina de Gernon在法國諾門迪奧內賽結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1092年在英國英格蘭越可爾艾史可利可享年72歲，埋葬在英國越可爾科比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire于大约1022年出生在法国諾門迪奧內时，他的父亲Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel31岁，母亲Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis22岁。他于大约1054年与Hugolina de Gernon在法国諾門迪奧內賽结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1092年在英国英格兰越可爾艾史可利可享年72岁，埋葬在英国越可爾科比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lasell
meanings: English: variant of   Lascelles  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Picot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Francois, Jacques, Jeanpaul, Luc, Pascal, Yves.  Spanish Esperanza, Aida, Alicia, Ana, Felipe, Luis.
French: from Old French picot ‘pointed object, pickaxe’, a nickname for someone who used such an implement. This surname is also found in Haiti.
Catalan: nickname from Valencian dialect picot ‘(sheep or goat) bell’.

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: English:
from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

variants.name: Picotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Honore, Andre, Jacques, Serge.
Altered form of French Picot , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire was born about 1022, in Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel, was 31 and his mother, Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis, was 22. He married Hugolina de Gernon about 1054, in Sai, Orne, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1092, in Escrick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Kirby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire est né environ 1022, à Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Hugolina de Gernon environ 1054, à Sai, Orne, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1092, à Escrick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire um 1022 in Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel 31 und seine Mutter Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis 22. Er hat um 1054 in Sai, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich Hugolina de Gernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1092 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Escrick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kirby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire è nato il circa 1022 nel Orne, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Hugolina de Gernon circa 1054, nel Sai, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1092, nel Escrick, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshireが約1022年にフランスノーマンディオルンで生まれた時，父Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenelは31歳，母Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimisは22歳であった。約1054年にフランスノーマンディオルンサイでHugolina de Gernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1092年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエスクリックで72歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアキルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire(이)가 대략 1022년 프랑스 노먼디 른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1054년 프랑스 노먼디 른 사이에서 Hugolina de Gernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스크릭에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 커비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire nasceu aproximadamente 1022, em Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hugolina de Gernon aproximadamente 1054, em Sai, Orne, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1092, em Escrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire родился около 1022 г. в местности орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hugolina de Gernon около 1054 г. в местности сеи, орн, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1092 г. в местности эскрикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности кирби, еркшир, Англия.

sm.about 1022–about 1092: e tusa o le 1022–e tusa o le 1092

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire nació aproximadamente 1022, en Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert FitzPicot de Saye Arenel, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Vicomtes Adeloya de Coimis, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hugolina de Gernon aproximadamente 1054, en Sai, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1092, en Escrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
